# Results

This directory stores generated experiment result files.

## Generated Files

The following files may be generated by the reproduction scripts:

```text
results/seed_repeat_baseline_noise_raw.csv
results/seed_repeat_baseline_noise_summary.csv
results/seed_repeat_pca_pcanoise_raw.csv
results/seed_repeat_pca_pcanoise_summary.csv
results/seed_repeat_summary_merged.csv
results/representative_cases.csv
```

## File Descriptions

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `seed_repeat_baseline_noise_raw.csv` | Raw seed-repeat results for E0/E1 baseline and noise conditions |
| `seed_repeat_baseline_noise_summary.csv` | Mean and standard deviation summary for baseline and noise conditions |
| `seed_repeat_pca_pcanoise_raw.csv` | Raw seed-repeat results for PCA and PCA+Noise conditions |
| `seed_repeat_pca_pcanoise_summary.csv` | Mean and standard deviation summary for PCA and PCA+Noise conditions |
| `seed_repeat_summary_merged.csv` | Merged summary file used for plotting and paper tables |
| `representative_cases.csv` | Representative reconstruction cases selected from prediction-level outputs |

## Git Tracking Policy

Prediction-level outputs may contain original or reconstructed text. Therefore, detailed prediction files are not intended to be tracked by Git.

The following files are ignored by `.gitignore`:

```text
results/predictions/
results/*_samples.csv
results/*_predictions.json
```

Aggregated summary files may be tracked when they do not contain sensitive raw text.
